creator: Kai.Grossjohann@CS.Uni-Dortmund.DE
text:
Linking the port www/libwww fails with the enclosed message. 
I CVSuped the ports just an hour ago, so I doubt that there is something
wrong there.

Hopefully this is a useful description.

How-To-Repeat: 
I did "cd /usr/ports/www/libwww ; make" then used script, then 
did a "make" again.  Here's the outpt of that second make:
